chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.136 of 2020 Pakistan International Airlines Corporation Ltd. & others Versus M/s Taj Medicos & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 1353/20 Dated: 29.01.2025 Mr. Abdul Qayyum Abbasi for appellants. Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara for respondent No.1. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. -.-.- A statement of the two counsels i.e. appellants and respondent No.1 is taken on record. What is stated by them is that the procurement period of one year is already over and whenever appellant intends to procure a fresh contract by way of transparent process, the respondent No.1 shall be at liberty and/or allowed to participate in the proceedings and entire process shall be conducted in accordance with law. By consent High Court Appeal stands disposed of along with listed application in the above terms. Chief Justice Judge
